=Rat Defence=

The Rat Defence is a solid option for black in the Old Indian. It mainly challenges white’s center and fights for development. White may take the pawn with '''[[Chess Opening Theory/1. d4/1...d6/2. c4/2...e5/3. dxe5|3. dxe5]]'''.
title: Chess Opening Theory/1. d4/1...d6/2. c4/2...e5
